\tzpentry{ID5498}{Orb Closure Orbital Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5498 introduces Orb Closure Orbital Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_{\mathrm{orb}} \sim \frac{v}{2\pi R}. \label{eq:closure_orbital} \end{equation}
